canonical_answer: A group of people are sitting on the ground in a shaded outdoor area processing harvested cacao pods. A large pile of brown and yellow oval-shaped pods dominates the left side of the frame. Several individuals use knives to cut open the fruits, placing white pulpy beans into metal bowls scattered on the dirt ground.

question: Describe what is happening in the segment where people are standing among the vegetation.
canonical_answer: Four people are standing together in a dense, green, leafy environment filled with large ferns and broad-leafed plants. A man wearing a black short-sleeved polo shirt stands centrally among the group. The person in the white t-shirt has their back to the camera while others face inward.

question: Describe the sequence of activities and scene changes observed throughout the video timeline.
canonical_answer: At 2s, people walk outdoors carrying a wooden pole and yellow basin; at 4s, a person in blue jeans walks towards the camera holding a brown object; at 12s, the scene changes to a group sitting on the ground; at 14s, individuals process brown cacao pods near metal bowls containing white pulp.

question: What specific objects are being carried or processed by the people in the different settings?
canonical_answer: At 2s, a person on the left holds a wooden pole horizontally; at 4s, a person in blue jeans walks on uneven rocky ground; at 12s, a large pile of harvested brown cacao pods is visible on the left; at 14s, metal bowls on the ground contain white pulpy cocoa beans.
